// Root (fallback) test bundle for rust_icu_ures integration tests.
root {
    greeting { "Hello" }
    farewell  { "Goodbye" }
    count:int { 42 }
    weights:intvector { 10, 20, 30 }
    errors {
        not_found { "Not found" }
        forbidden  { "Forbidden" }
    }
    data:bin { 010203 }
    phrases:array { "one", "two", "three" }
    mixed {
        label  { "hello" }
        number:int { 1 }
    }
    greeting_alias:alias { "/LOCALE/greeting" }
    count_alias:alias { "/LOCALE/count" }
}
